title: Looking back from the end of your life at the lineage you started
subtitle: A five-minute guided visualisation for anchoring the decision to build a new family wealth story.
excerpt: A guided visualisation for seeing, from the vantage of late life, the lineage that started with the decision you are making now. Use when the long-term reality of what you are building needs to become concrete.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 13 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for making the long-term decision feel real. You travel forward to the end of your life and look back at what the choice you are making today set in motion.
, the grounding principles are the same.
Sit comfortably with your eyes closed. Take three slow breaths to settle.
Picture yourself at the end of a long life, sitting somewhere you feel at ease, a chair by a window, a garden bench, a kitchen table. You are well. You are looking back.

From that seat, look back at the woman you are right now. She is making a decision. She is choosing to be the first person in her family line to build real, lasting wealth. Notice how that decision looks from here, the ripple it sent forward.

Let the people who came after her come into view. Her children. Their children. People who grew up without the money worry she carried. Who learned, from how she handled money, that there was enough, and more. Let their faces come into focus.
Sit with that for a moment. Then bring your attention back to the woman you are now, making the decision today. She is the one who started this.
Open your eyes when ready. Write one line about what you saw if you want to hold onto it.
Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 13 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
